---
title: "prexorctl module new"
description: "Generates a new cloud-module under java/cloud-modules/<name>/"
---

<!-- auto-generated by tools/gen-cli-docs.ts — do not edit by hand. -->

Generates a new cloud-module under java/cloud-modules/<name>/.
Three flavours, picked by flag:
  (default)            — Full wizard (TUI). Asks identity, storage, REST,
                         frontend, plugin yes/no, per-platform multi-version
                         strategy, capabilities. Calls the underlying scaffold
                         with the answers. The name argument is optional in
                         wizard mode (the wizard asks for it).
  --interactive        — Compact prompt: only asks which platform-plugin
                         targets to ship. Same as the wizard's targets step,
                         everything else uses example-template defaults.
  --targets paper,…    — Non-interactive subset. For scripts.
  --all-defaults       — No prompts at all. Drops the full example template,
                         all targets emitted. Same shape as the historical
                         scripts/new-module.mjs behaviour.
Replaces scripts/new-module.mjs.

## Usage

```text
prexorctl module new [name] [flags]
```

## Flags

```text
--all-defaults                 Skip the wizard and emit the full example template (legacy behaviour).
        --browser                      Open the wizard in a local browser (Phase B.2 — currently returns a clear error).
        --dry                          Walk the template and print what would happen without writing anything
        --force                        Overwrite an existing module directory instead of failing
    -h, --help                         help for new
        --interactive                  Compact prompt: only asks which platform-plugin targets. Skips the full wizard.
        --package string               Override the generated Java package (default: me.prexorjustin.prexorcloud.modules.<name>)
        --repo-root string             Path to the repo root (default: discovered upwards from the working directory)
        --strip-comments // STEP …   Remove // STEP … and `/** STEP … */` teaching comments from generated sources
        --targets strings              Comma-separated subset of plugin targets (paper,folia,velocity,bungeecord,bedrock-geyser). Skips the wizard.
        --wizard                       Force the full wizard even when --targets / --all-defaults are passed. (Wizard is the default already.)
```

## Global flags

```text
--ascii               Use ASCII glyphs only (no unicode box drawing, sparklines, etc.)
        --context string      Override active context for this invocation
    -c, --controller string   Override controller URL
    -j, --json                Output in JSON format
        --no-color            Disable colored output
    -t, --token string        Override auth token
    -v, --verbose             Show HTTP request/response details
```
